references.title: Franck Muller 9880 SC DT GRAVITI Aeternitas Mega 4
references.text: Most complicated Franck Muller wristwatch ever made with 36 complications, limited to 99 pieces.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 9880 SC DT GRAVITI Aeternitas Mega 4 watch

references.title: Franck Muller 2850 QP Perpetual Calendar
references.text: One of the earliest Franck Muller complicated pieces, establishing the brand's haute horlogerie credentials.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 2850 QP Perpetual Calendar watch

references.title: Franck Muller 5850 T MAG Master of Complications Tourbillon
references.text: Early tourbillon model that defined Franck Muller's signature tonneau-shaped complication aesthetic.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 5850 T MAG Master of Complications Tourbillon watch

references.title: Franck Muller 2852 MB Crazy Hours
references.text: First iteration of the Crazy Hours complication with jumping hour display in non-sequential order.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 2852 MB Crazy Hours watch

references.title: Franck Muller 7850 CC GP Grande Complication
references.text: Combined perpetual calendar and chronograph in Franck Muller's early grand complication offering.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 7850 CC GP Grande Complication watch

references.title: Franck Muller 8880 CC IFO Imperial Tourbillon
references.text: Featured innovative visible escapement wheel on dial side with imperial design elements.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 8880 CC IFO Imperial Tourbillon watch

references.title: Franck Muller 3080 CC AT Chronograph Automatic
references.text: Early automatic chronograph in the signature curved case, rare production piece.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 3080 CC AT Chronograph Automatic watch

references.title: Franck Muller 7000 CC A Crazy Hours
references.text: Original Crazy Hours with jumping hour complication that became a brand signature.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 7000 CC A Crazy Hours watch

references.title: Franck Muller 8880 CC DT Bi-Retrograde
references.text: Dual retrograde display showcasing Franck Muller's mechanical innovation prowess.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 8880 CC DT Bi-Retrograde watch

references.title: Franck Muller 2852 QP Quantième Perpétuel Japan Limited
references.text: Japanese market exclusive perpetual calendar, limited to 25 pieces.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 2852 QP Quantième Perpétuel Japan Limited watch

references.title: Franck Muller 8880 T MAR Master of Complications Marine
references.text: Marine-themed limited edition with multiple complications in titanium.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 8880 T MAR Master of Complications Marine watch

references.title: Franck Muller 9880 T Tourbillon Imperial
references.text: Early tourbillon in classic Cintrée case, establishing haute horlogerie credentials.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 9880 T Tourbillon Imperial watch

references.title: Franck Muller 7880 MB Three Time Zone
references.text: Launched the Master Banker collection with innovative three time zone display for travelers.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 7880 MB Three Time Zone watch

references.title: Franck Muller 6850 MB Asia Limited Edition
references.text: Asia exclusive with Cintrée Curvex case, limited regional variant.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 6850 MB Asia Limited Edition watch

references.title: Franck Muller 8880 T QPS Aeternitas Mega 4
references.text: Limited to 99 pieces, one of the most complicated wristwatches ever with 36 complications and 1,483 components.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 8880 T QPS Aeternitas Mega 4 watch

references.title: Franck Muller 5850 RM Revolution Tourbillon
references.text: Triple-axis tourbillon with revolutionary movement architecture for enhanced chronometric precision.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 5850 RM Revolution Tourbillon watch

references.title: Franck Muller 7851 REV Bi-Retrograde Tourbillon
references.text: Combining tourbillon with bi-retrograde seconds in Revolution collection.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 7851 REV Bi-Retrograde Tourbillon watch

references.title: Franck Muller 9880 SC DT MAG Giga Tourbillon
references.text: Massive tourbillon cage visible at 12 o'clock, one of the largest wristwatch tourbillons ever produced.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 9880 SC DT MAG Giga Tourbillon watch

references.title: Franck Muller 1752 QP Casablanca Perpetual Calendar
references.text: Round case perpetual calendar, rare departure from tonneau shape in complicated models.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 1752 QP Casablanca Perpetual Calendar watch

references.title: Franck Muller 8880 CH Crazy Hours Long Island
references.text: Rectangular case version of Crazy Hours, limited production run for Asian markets.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 8880 CH Crazy Hours Long Island watch

references.title: Franck Muller 5850 VEGAS Vegas Tourbillon
references.text: Roulette-inspired dial with functional gaming element combined with visible tourbillon.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 5850 VEGAS Vegas Tourbillon watch

references.title: Franck Muller 6850 T GR Thunderbolt Tourbillon
references.text: Lightning bolt-shaped tourbillon bridge, limited to 28 pieces with ultra-modern aesthetic.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 6850 T GR Thunderbolt Tourbillon watch

references.title: Franck Muller 3880 MB L Master Banker Color Dreams
references.text: Colored sapphire hour markers with tri-compax layout for three time zones, Japanese market special edition.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 3880 MB L Master Banker Color Dreams watch

references.title: Franck Muller 7880 QP E Evolution Perpetual Calendar
references.text: First perpetual calendar in carbon fiber case with modern sporty design language.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 7880 QP E Evolution Perpetual Calendar watch

references.title: Franck Muller 1200 CH Chronograph
references.text: First Conquistador chronograph in steel, launching the sportier collection line.
references.image_query: Franck Muller 1200 CH Chronograph watch
